messages.body: I can’t do 11:30.
Done
Okay! I will give you a call at that time.
Hello Erin, I have sent you a google meet call invite on your email (walter.brimm@gmail.com) for 10 AM PST
Hey Erin we are waiting for you on the call
Ok just confirming cause the invite says 11:30
Thank you so much Erin. Can you please let me know an ideal time for us to connect?
In another 15 mins
Hi Anu, tomorrow morning would be good.
Please confirm if you would be joining the call?
Yes
Around 10:00 would be good
Ohh don’t worry! The call is in another 15 mins, Erin.
Ok
Erin as confirmed by you, I have set up a call w you for 10:00 AM.
Is it at 10:00?
Hi, can you please send the google meet invite to erinh100@yahoo.com
Hey Erin, I hope you are doing well. Erin, I wanted to know your availability for a call maybe today or anytime this week. Looking forward to hearing from you :)
